# XCTAttachment.ImageQuality.low

**Case**

Low image quality, represented as a highly compressed lossy JPEG image.

## Declaration

```swift
case low
```

## Quality Settings

- **XCTAttachment.ImageQuality.original**: Original image quality, represented as a lossless PNG image.
- **XCTAttachment.ImageQuality.medium**: Medium image quality, represented as a high quality lossy JPEG image.

items.description: Original image quality, represented as a lossless PNG image.
items.name: XCTAttachment.ImageQuality.original

items.description: Medium image quality, represented as a high quality lossy JPEG image.
